reference: How may I help you today? I've been having, uhh, like, nasal congestion and I've been sneezing a lot, over these last couple of days, and I've also been having a sore throat. Uh, yeah, now that you say it, yeah, when I was bending over to put my shoes on, I felt just a bit of pressure on the front of my face. OK and do you have any allergies? Um, yeah, to cats. Have you been around a cat recently? No, we used to have a cat, but unfortunately we were unable to keep it because allergies were so bad. Yeah, do you have any environmental allergies at all? OK, great so, have you spent any time outdoors or spent any time with people who you think might be sick? Have you taken any antibiotics recently? No. OK, alright well it sounds like you're probably having just a common cold, likely viral. So, and seeing that it's only been two days, have your symptoms gotten better or worse in the past couple of days? They've gotten worse since it's started. Yeah, OK, well, it's only been two days so far, let's just keep an eye on your symptoms and see how you're doing. It might also be a good idea just to get a covid swab done, and if your symptoms continue to worsen, give me a call again and we can talk about it a little bit more and see if maybe a bacterial infection or if there's something else that's going on.
